3263390.name: Kamala-Tale
3263390.description:
Welcome to The United States! In this nation, you control the future President, Kamala Harris. 

Kamala is tasked with fighting for a New Way Forward that protects our fundamental freedoms and strengthens our democracy! Debate your way through a divided nation, secure endorsements and future voters, and finish what your mentor, Joe Biden, started!

features

  • Prosecuting is unnecessary: debate your opponents with the power of rhetoric!

  • Dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters, or "bullet-hell"

  • Painfully accurate pixel-caricatures of your favorite (or not so favorite) politicians.

  • Beautiful arrangements of classic Americana tunes, with a tinge of retro flavor!

  • Patriotic, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor and positivity. 

  • Take on former President, Donald J. Trump, in an ultimate final battle of the minds!
